Didi Dramani wants Hearts of Oak to finish strong against Medeama
results.description: Hearts of Oak coach Didi Dramani has stressed the need for his side to approach every game with the mindset of winning and showing their style of play.The Hearts coach made the remarks during his pre-match press conference ahead of their final Ghana Premier League game of the season against Medeama SC.The Phobians will host Medeama in their Week 34 clash as they look to finish the campaign on a positive note after a difficult run of form. Hearts have managed one win, two draws, and two defeats in their last five matches." I think that this is the Premier League and then in the Premier League all the games are very tough and this is one of them. We have to always try to come out into games prepared to win games, prepared to express our identity and then to try to control the opponent. And then try to prevail our identity and so I think that we know what strength they have and then we also know what strengths we have in our team, and then we try to consolidate our strengths, and then also manage the opponent's capabilities," he told Hearts TV.Medeama head...

results.title: Public assistance requested in identifying deceased dog found in Peabody
results.description: Amanda Lurey PEABODY — The Animal Rescue League of Boston Law Enforcement Department is asking for the public’s assistance in identifying a deceased dog that was found on the shoulder of the Route 1 on-ramp behind Santarpio’s Pizza on April 18. The dog has been described as an unspayed, black female American bulldog/pitbull mix. She was wearing [...] The post Public assistance requested in identifying deceased dog found in Peabody appeared first on Itemlive .

results.title: Fola Visits Chelsea’s Stamford Bridge During UK Tour
results.description: Fast-rising Nigerian music star Fola has shared a major career moment after visiting Chelsea F.C.’s iconic home ground, Stamford Bridge, during his stay in the United Kingdom. The singer, born Folarin Odulami, took to his X page to document the memorable experience, posting a series of photographs and video clips from the historic stadium in West London. “From peeping at viewing centres to invitations to the bridge,” he wrote, reflecting on his journey from watching football in local viewing centres to receiving access to one of the world’s most famous football arenas. Fola, who has continued to build momentum within the Nigerian and international music scenes, reportedly stepped away briefly from his ongoing European promotional tour to visit the stadium and soak in the atmosphere surrounding the Premier League giants. For the special occasion, the artiste was dressed in a customised Chelsea jersey bearing the name “Striker” and the number 9 at the back, adding a personal touch to the experience as he toured the club’s facilities. Photos from the visit showed the singer walking through the players’ tunnel, standing pitch-side, and exploring some of Stamford Bridge’s most recognised sections, including the trophy room and conference area. The visit also sparked excitement among fans online, many of whom praised the singer’s steady rise and described the moment as inspirational for young creatives chasing global recognition. Fola has been gaining attention for his unique sound and energetic performances, with his growing international presence signalling another promising breakthrough for a new generation of Nigerian artistes making waves beyond Africa.

results.title: SRH vs RCB, IPL 2026: Who Won Yesterday’s Match? Results, Highlights, and Key Performances
results.description: Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a commanding 55-run win over Royal Challengers Bengaluru in IPL 2026. Fifties from Ishan Kishan, Abhishek Sharma, and Heinrich Klaasen helped SRH post 255/4. RCB struggled to chase despite Rajat Patidar’s half-century but still finished top of the table, advancing to Qualifier 1.
